meta.title: About Verity Minecraft
meta.description: Learn about Verity Minecraft, an independent download guide for Verity Java, Bedrock, and PE players.
meta.keywords: about Verity Minecraft, Verity Minecraft download guide

legal.title: About Verity Minecraft
legal.description: Verity Minecraft helps players choose the correct Verity download path for Java Edition, Bedrock Edition, and PE-style mobile installs.

sections.heading: Our Mission
paragraphs: Our goal is to make Verity Minecraft downloads easier to evaluate. The site separates Java, Bedrock, and PE-style mobile intent, then points users toward source pages instead of confusing mirrors.

sections.heading: What We Cover
bullets: Verity Minecraft download paths for Java Edition and Bedrock Edition.
PE and APK search guidance with caution around unknown mirrors.
Install steps, compatibility notes, troubleshooting, and version snapshots.
Clear disclaimers when a source is external or third-party.

sections.heading: Independence
paragraphs: Verity Minecraft is an independent fan-made guide. It is not affiliated with Mojang, Microsoft, Minecraft, CurseForge, Modrinth, Google Play, or the Verity creators. Names and trademarks belong to their respective owners.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: Corrections, source updates, and contact requests can be sent to support@verityminecraft.blog.
